profiles.aggregationBasis: Equal-weight sum of PFOS, PFOA, PFNA, and PFHxS for EU food-risk reporting aligned with the EFSA 2020 PFAS opinion.
profiles.weightingBasisSummary: No potency weighting is applied; the profile preserves the explicit EFSA-4 analyte panel.
notes: Primary EU health-based PFAS reporting profile for review-oriented food exposure interpretation.
This profile is the default Dietary MCP PFAS reporting basis for EU food-risk review.

profiles.displayName: EU PFAS EFSA-4 lower-bound ML compliance reporting
profiles.aggregationBasis: Lower-bound compliance-oriented sum of linear and branched PFOS, PFOA, PFNA, and PFHxS aligned with current EU contaminant maximum-level reporting.
profiles.weightingBasisSummary: No potency weighting is applied; this profile preserves the EU compliance-oriented lower-bound EFSA-4 sum.
notes: Use this profile for EU contaminant-law style PFAS sum reporting, especially when matrix-specific maximum-level review is in scope.
This compliance-oriented profile does not replace the primary EFSA food-risk reporting profile.

profiles.displayName: EU PFAS individual analyte panel detail
profiles.aggregationBasis: Preserve analyte-level PFOS, PFOA, PFNA, and PFHxS measurements alongside any aggregate PFAS metric.
profiles.weightingBasisSummary: No aggregation beyond analyte-level preservation is implied by this supporting-detail profile.
notes: Supporting-detail profile that keeps the analyte panel explicit in review bundles and monitoring imports.
Use this profile together with, not instead of, the main EFSA-4 aggregate profiles.
